title: genista tricuspidata subsp. duriaei
intro: Genista tricuspidata subsp. duriaei, also known as French broom or Bush broom, is a plant species within the genus Genista, characterized by its dense clusters of yellow flowers and thorny stems. Genista tricuspidata subsp. duriaei has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal remedy, typically in the form of infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions including digestive issues and respiratory problems. However, due to its toxicity, Genista tricuspidata subsp. duriaei should be used with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
